raw_consumer_statement:
My name is XXXX XXXX XXXX, aka XXXX XXXX. I have a credit card account with Macy 's American Express, and I am a platinum member, which means I make many purchases throughout the year and earn some perks. 

Of the many purchases I made, there were two specific purchases which I disputed which have not been resolved. I will detail the two purchases below : The first is a dispute for {$80.00} ; purchase made on XXXX XXXX, 2025, totaled {$130.00}. 
The second dispute for {$100.00}, purchase made on XX/XX/scrub>, 2025, totaled {$110.00}. 

What I purchased was very expensive makeup by a designer called XXXX XXXX, who make overpriced lipsticks, which come undone, and you end up with a lipstick cap but no lipstick! I told this to Macy 's when I disputed these charges, and their response was, return the lipstick! And refused to credit my account. 

First of all, there is NO lipstick! I do not know if they deliberately do not read disputes or fail to understand them. When the lipsticks came apart, all I was left with was the decorative caps. And further, I confirmed with the staff at my local Macy 's store in XXXX XXXX, California, that even IF I had been able to salvage the lipstick, they do NOT accept used lipsticks for return.
